title: Vibrant Sunflower Yellow Paper Party Bags (25cm x 13cm) 12 Count - Perfect for Celebrations and Events
features: VIBRANT & EYE-CATCHING: Stand out at your next celebration with our stunning vibrant sunflower yellow paper party bags! These eye-catching bags add a burst of color to any event and are sure to impress your guests.
VERSATILE SIZE: Measuring at 25cm x 13cm, these premium quality party bags are the perfect size for holding a variety of items, including treats, gifts, party favors, and more.

CONVENIENT 12 COUNT PACK: Receive 12 high-quality, eco-friendly paper party bags in each order, ensuring you have enough to cater to all your guests during weddings, birthdays, baby showers, or any special occasion.

EPIC WATER BATTLES & SUMMER FUN: Sturdy and durable, our vibrant sunflower yellow bags are designed to withstand those epic water battles and summer fun activities, making them perfect for holding water balloons, squirt guns, or beach toys.
BOOST YOUR CELEBRATION: Capture the attention and delight of partygoers by choosing our vibrant, sunflower yellow paper party bags as the ultimate gift or favor bag, making your event memorable.
Pack of 12 Paper Sunflower Yellow Party Bags
Yellow Paper Party Bags measure approximately 25cm x 13cm x 9cm (10" x 5" x 3.5")
Ideal for handing out treats at an Easter party, Hawaiian party, summer BBQ, baby shower, birthday party or other special occasion
Fill with sweets, cake or party bag fillers to thank guests for attending your celebration
Coordinate with other yellow party supplies and party decorations from Unique Party
